free_text: A study of the 2H(d,p)3H and 2H(d,n)3He reactions
and the excited state of 4He at 23.9 MeV
A target gas was CP grade deuterium 99.5% pure
by placing a thin LiF target at the reaction center
in the scattering chamber. The gamma-rays from the
and 672 keV were observed using a sodium iodide
Silicon surface-barrier with an active area of
50 mm2 and a depletion depth of 200 um.
Pulse-height spectra were accumulated at four angles
simultaneously. A fifth counter situated at 90 degr.
CNPD: corrected 4-dig. year and lower cases.
The normalized (d,p) cross sections and the measured
ratios were used to obtain the (d,n) cross sections.
